title: Inverse compton scattering from solid targets irradiated by ultra-short laser pulses in the 10<sup>22</sup> –10<sup>23</sup> W/cm<sup>2</sup> regime
abstract: Emission of high energy gamma rays via the non-linear inverse Compton scattering process (ICS) in interactions of ultra-intense laser pulses with thin solid foils is studied using particle-in-cell simulations. It is shown that the angular distribution of the ICS photons has a forward-oriented two-directional structure centred at an angle ϑ =± 30◦ , a value which corresponds to a model based on a standing wave approximation to the electromagnetic field in front of the target, which only increases at the highest intensities due to faster hole boring, which renders the approximation invalid. The conversion efficiency is shown to exhibit a super-linear increase with the driving pulse intensity. In comparison to emission via electron-nucleus bremsstrahlung, it is shown that the higher absorption, further enhanced by faster hole boring, in the targets with lower atomic number strongly favours the ICS process.
research_question: 如何通过超短激光脉冲与薄固体靶材的相互作用实现高能伽马射线的发射？
approach: 粒子在单元格模拟, 非线性逆康普顿散射
key_findings: ICS光子的角分布呈现出以ϑ = ±30°为中心的前向双向结构
在低原子序数靶材中，快速孔洞钻孔效应增强了逆康普顿散射过程
limitations: 未明确考虑不同材料的影响
未明确探讨高强度激光脉冲对其他靶材的影响

gaps.description: 缺乏对不同靶材厚度的系统性比较
gaps.evidence: 缺乏对不同靶材厚度的系统性比较

gaps.description: 缺乏对激光脉冲参数优化的研究
gaps.evidence: 缺乏对激光脉冲参数优化的研究

physical_insight: 高强度激光脉冲与薄固体靶材的相互作用中，逆康普顿散射过程的效率受到孔洞钻孔速度和靶材原子序数的显著影响。
contribution: 本文通过粒子在单元格模拟研究了超强激光脉冲与薄固体靶材的相互作用，揭示了逆康普顿散射过程的高能伽马射线发射特性。
evidence: 转换效率随驱动脉冲强度的超线性增加
在d = 2 µm Au箔中，逆康普顿散射与电子-原子散射的总转换效率相当
claims: 声称在d = 2 µm Au箔中，逆康普顿散射的总转换效率与电子-原子散射相当
声称低原子序数靶材中逆康普顿散射过程的吸收更高
unanswered_questions: 在更高强度下，逆康普顿散射的行为如何变化？
不同靶材的最佳厚度和材料选择是什么？

title: Ultrafast imaging of terahertz electric waveforms using quantum dots
abstract: Microscopic electric fields govern the majority of elementary excitations in condensed matter and drive electronics at frequencies approaching the Terahertz (THz) regime. However, only few imaging schemes are able to resolve sub-wavelength fields in the THz range, such as scanning-probe techniques, electro-optic sampling, and ultrafast electron microscopy. Still, intrinsic constraints on sample geometry, acquisition speed and field strength limit their applicability. Here, we harness the quantum-confined Stark-effect to encode ultrafast electric near-fields into colloidal quantum dot luminescence. Our approach, termed Quantum-probe Field Microscopy (QFIM), combines far-field imaging of visible photons with phase-resolved sampling of electric waveforms. By capturing ultrafast movies, we spatio-temporally resolve a Terahertz resonance inside a bowtie antenna and unveil the propagation of a Terahertz waveguide excitation deeply in the sub-wavelength regime. The demonstrated QFIM approach is compatible with strong-field excitation and sub-micrometer resolution—introducing a direct route towards ultrafast field imaging of complex nanodevices in-operando.
research_question: 如何在太赫兹频率范围内实现亚波长电场的成像？
approach: 量子限制斯塔克效应, 量子探针场显微镜(QFIM), 远场成像, 相位分辨采样
key_findings: 成功捕捉到太赫兹共振的超快电影
揭示了亚波长范围内太赫兹波导激发的传播
limitations: 仅在特定的金结构中进行实验
未明确提及在不同材料或几何形状下的适用性

gaps.description: 缺乏对不同材料的系统性比较
gaps.evidence: 缺乏对不同材料的系统性比较

gaps.description: 对量子点探针的长期稳定性未进行评估
gaps.evidence: 对量子点探针的长期稳定性未进行评估

physical_insight: 通过量子限制斯塔克效应，电场的超快动态可以通过量子点的发光特性进行编码和成像。
contribution: 本文通过量子限制斯塔克效应实现了对亚波长太赫兹电场的超快成像。
evidence: 使用的量子点探针为CdSe-CdS核心壳纳米晶体
claims: 声称能够在亚波长尺度上分辨太赫兹电场
声称实现了超快电场波形的成像
unanswered_questions: 如何提高QFIM在不同材料中的适用性？
是否可以扩展到更高频率的成像？

title: Quantum-confined stark effect in single CdSe nanocrystallite quantum dots
abstract:
The quantum-confined Stark effect in single cadmium selenide (CdSe) nanocrystallite quantum dots was studied. The electric field dependence of the single-dot spectrum is characterized by a highly polarizable excited state (∼10
              5
              cubic angstroms, compared to typical molecular values of order 10 to 100 cubic angstroms), in the presence of randomly oriented local electric fields that change over time. These local fields result in spontaneous spectral diffusion and contribute to ensemble inhomogeneous broadening. Stark shifts of the lowest excited state more than two orders of magnitude larger than the linewidth were observed, suggesting the potential use of these dots in electro-optic modulation devices.

gaps.description: 现有文献未系统比较不同技术路线在宽参数范围内的性能表现

title: Quantum Cascade Laser
abstract: A semiconductor injection laser that differs in a fundamental way from diode lasers has been demonstrated. It is built out of quantum semiconductor structures that were grown by molecular beam epitaxy and designed by band structure engineering. Electrons streaming down a potential staircase sequentially emit photons at the steps. The steps consist of coupled quantum wells in which population inversion between discrete conduction band excited states is achieved by control of tunneling. A strong narrowing of the emission spectrum, above threshold, provides direct evidence of laser action at a wavelength of 4.2 micrometers with peak powers in excess of 8 milliwatts in pulsed operation. In quantum cascade lasers, the wavelength, entirely determined by quantum confinement, can be tailored from the mid-infrared to the submillimeter wave region in the same heterostructure material.
